GOTS Certified BSCI Audited Waffle Knit Rib Knit MOQ from 100 pcs

Knit Fabric Options

Organic Cotton Fleece
95% organic cotton 5% spandex. 280GSM. Warm and soft, ideal for higher TOG ratings in cooler climates.
Bamboo Organic Cotton Interlock
70% bamboo 30% organic cotton. 220GSM. Smooth double-knit construction, excellent drape and recovery.
Bamboo Jersey
95% bamboo 5% spandex. 220GSM. Lightweight, thermoregulating, naturally antibacterial. Popular for 0.5–1.0 TOG.
Organic Cotton Jersey
100% organic cotton. 190GSM. GOTS certified. Breathable and durable, suitable for year-round use.

Standard Specifications

Spec Options / Range
TOG Rating 0.5 / 1.0 / 2.5 (custom available)
Sizes NB / 0–6M / 6–12M / 12–18M (custom sizing available)
Fabric Weight 180–280 gsm depending on construction and TOG
Closure 2-way zip, shoulder snap, or combination
Arm opening Sleeveless standard; with sleeves available
MOQ 100 pcs per colorway / style
Sample lead time 15–20 days
Bulk lead time 45–60 days after sample approval
Certifications GOTS (organic), BSCI (social compliance)

Frequently Asked Questions

  • What is a knit sleeping sack vs. a woven sleeping bag?
    Knit fabric has natural stretch, giving the sack a soft, body-conforming fit. Woven sleeping bags use tighter non-stretch fabric, which is more structured. Knit sacks are increasingly preferred for loungewear-style aesthetics and comfort.
  • Can I get GOTS certification documentation?
    Yes. Our factory holds GOTS certification. Transaction certificates and scope certificates are available upon request.
  • Can you match a Pantone color for the knit?
    Yes, we can dye to a target Pantone reference. A lab dip will be sent for your approval before bulk production.
  • Do you offer different TOG ratings in the same style?
    Yes. The same knit sack design can be produced in multiple TOG ratings by adjusting the filling weight. MOQ applies per TOG variant.
  • What's the minimum order quantity?
    100 pieces per colorway/style. For mixed colors of the same style, please enquire for combined MOQ options.

Source Baby Knit Sleeping Sacks Direct from Factory

Share your design reference, fabric choice, TOG, and quantity. We'll respond within 24 hours.
